◎简　　介  

　　In the first ever documentary series to reveal the role of the Arctic nations in WWII, discover the importance of the region in the most globalised war to date.Against the backdrop of the stunning yet unforgiving Arctic circle, follow divers as they locate sunken German aircraft wrecks, archaeologists as they investigate hidden mass graves and historians as they track down sec...
